subcodes.first_line: Glory be to Thee, O Lord my God! I beg of Thee by Thy most excellent titles, and Thy most exalted words
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک باسمائک الحسنی و کلماتک الاتم الاعلی و بانوار
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @Greatest Name, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God
